chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3644 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَكْتُوبٌ فِي اَلتَّوْرَاةِ أَنَّهُ مَنْ بَاعَ أَرْضاً وَ مَاءً فَلَمْ يَضَعْ ثَمَنَهُ فِي أَرْضٍ وَ مَاءٍ ذَهَبَ ثَمَنُهُ مَحْقاً ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3644 - Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"It is written in the Torah that whoever sells land and water, and does not invest its price in land and water, its price will be lost in ruin."
